title: User
description: A user within a Fastly customer account.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the user.

login.description: The email address of the user, used as the login.

role.description: The role assigned to the user.

customer_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the customer the user belongs to.

email_hash.description: The hash of the user's email for Gravatar integration.

two_factor_auth_enabled.description: Whether two-factor authentication is enabled for the user.

limit_services.description: Whether the user's access is limited to specific services.

locked.description: Whether the user account is locked.

require_new_password.description: Whether the user must set a new password on next login.

created_at.description: The date and time the user was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the user was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time the user was deleted.
